corrections.description: File is too short and marked as needing re-extraction
corrections.text: A SNOWY MORNING The snow sneaked in on us last night On downy, padded feet. So still it is as flakes float down All muffled in the street. The cars creep past like shrouded ghosts. No children shout aloud. The sky above is quiet, too; One massive, great gray cloud. How peaceful and serene earth lies Under its coverlet of white. That softly, silently drifted down During the tranquil night. Lucy W. Jones
